title: ChangeCatalogEntry
description: Schema for a single documented system-change entry. Enforces Constitution Principle II v1.1.0 (What/Why/Citation/EvidenceGrade + Action). Mirrors the PSD1 catalog files under config/. Validated by tests/Catalog.Schema.Tests.ps1. The 'Action' field is the primary dispatch key consumed by Invoke-CatalogEntry; adding a new feature means adding an entry, not new code paths (FR-024, SC-011).

Type.description: OPTIONAL, derived category of change (kept for authoring ergonomics/back-compat). The authoritative dispatch key is 'Action'.

Action.description: Primary dispatch key. Invoke-CatalogEntry routes each entry to the handler for its Action. The set is intentionally extensible: new Action values are added alongside a new handler branch, but existing features/entries never require new per-feature parameters or switches (FR-024/FR-025).

Target.description: For RemoveAppx: the provisioned package name (string). For RemoveCapability/EnableOptionalFeature/AddCapability: the capability/feature name (string, e.g. 'Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux'). For SetRegistry: an object with Hive/Path/Name/Kind/Value.

Rationale.description: WHY it is safe and desirable (Principle II).

Citation.description: URL to an authoritative source, or the literal 'Unverified' (Principle II).

EvidenceGrade.description: Confidence rating for the Citation (Principle II v1.1.0). 1 = official Microsoft documentation; 2 = reputable third-party website/vendor; 3 = community/forum. A grade-3 entry MUST NOT be DefaultEnabled (see allOf). Missing EvidenceGrade fails CI (FR-026, SC-010).

Reversible.description: Whether the change can be undone (FR-018).

Reversal.description: How to undo the change (recommended when Reversible=true).

DefaultEnabled.description: Whether this entry is in the default profile. Edge/OneDrive removal MUST be false.

Unverified.description: If true, entry lacks an authoritative source and DefaultEnabled MUST be false.

allOf.comment: Evidence-grade gate (Principle II v1.1.0 / FR-026): a grade-3 (community/forum) entry MUST be opt-in.
